testcase.name: test_login
testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:63: in test_login assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"Invalid credentials"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_auth_me_authenticated

failure.message: AssertionError: Internal Server Error assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:78: in test_auth_me_authenticated assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: Internal Server Error E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_pin

failure.message: AssertionError: Internal Server Error assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:89: in test_create_pin assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: Internal Server Error E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_admin_pins_no_admin_403

failure.message: AssertionError: expected 403, got 500: Internal Server Error assert 500 == 403 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:130: in test_admin_pins_no_admin_403 assert r.status_code == 403, f"expected 403, got {r.status_code}: {r.text}" E AssertionError: expected 403, got 500: Internal Server Error E assert 500 == 403 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
